parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
participant Client
participant TEAPServer

TEAPServer -> Client: EAP-Request/
Identity
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=Identity
TEAPServer -> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TEAP Start,
Authority-ID TLV
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ClientHello)
TEAPServer -> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ServerHello,
ServerKeyExchange,
ServerHelloDone)
note left: (1)
(2)
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
ClientKeyExchange,
CertificateVerify,
ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished)
note left: (3)
TEAPServer -> Client: EAP-Request/
Type=TEAP,
TLS(ChangeCipherSpec,
Finished),
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}
Client -> TEAPServer: EAP-Response/
Type=TEAP,
{Crypto-Binding TLV,
Result TLV=Success}
TEAPServer -> Client: EAP-Success
@enduml
```
